ShortDescription.Value: Vendorable packet-first workflow core for token-efficient Codex orchestration.

Configuration.LongDescription: PacketFlow Foundry ships reusable packet-workflow contracts, templates, builders, overlay profiles, default managed agents, and retained skills. This repo-local release adapter exists so the draft-release-copy workflow can bind PacketFlow Foundry release metadata without changing reusable core skill semantics.
Configuration.ChangeLog: - Add managed-copy consumer bootstrap defaults and project profile sync for vendored consumers. - Harden retained GitHub and local mutation workflows while expanding the retained-skill surface. - Add reword-head-commit and analysis-ref-aware weekly update support. - Split evaluation telemetry from runtime state and emit spawn plans and execution ledgers.
